zh.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當James Allard Sr於1649年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克時，他的父親Hugh Allard26歲，母親Grace Freyer22歲。他於1682年與Honor Wallis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆也格斯波特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1722年6月19日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Allard Sr was born in 1649, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, his father, Hugh Allard, was 26 and his mother, Grace Freyer, was 22. He married Honor Wallis in 1682, in Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 June 1722, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Allard Sr è nato il nel 1649 nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Hugh Allard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Grace Freyer, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Honor Wallis nel 1682, nel Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1722, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Allard Srが1649年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで生まれた時，父Hugh Allardは26歳，母Grace Freyerは22歳であった。1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムリゴスプオルトでHonor Wallisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1722年6月19日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹
ko.lifeSummary: James Allard Sr(이)가 1649년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Allard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Freyer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 리 고스포트에서 Honor Wallis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1722년 6월 19일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Allard Sr nasceu em 1649, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, seu pai, Hugh Allard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Grace Freyer, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Honor Wallis em 1682, em Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1722, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Allard Sr родился в 1649 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Hugh Allard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Freyer, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Honor Wallis в 1682 г. в местности госпорт, ри, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 июня 1722 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Allard Sr nació en 1649, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, su papá, Hugh Allard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Grace Freyer, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Honor Wallis en 1682, en Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1722, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
